# Quantum Acceleration Program
The corporate solution for your organization to become quantum ready
## Adopting quantum computing
## the right strategy
During the last decades, organizations have faced disruptive technology challenges. We went through the digital and cloud transformations; now, we are experiencing the AI transformation. Quantum computing is next in line. This rapidly emerging technology holds the potential to solve the most pressing scientific and industrial problems, such as optimization, cryptography, and drug discovery. It will certainly change the world in ways escaping our imagination. For these reasons, many industries are already adopting quantum computing. However, embracing emerging technologies goes beyond a technical problem; it is a people's challenge. Quandela's Quantum Acceleration Program will effectively assist your organization in adopting quantum computing for your quantum transformation.
[Explore Quantum Use Cases](https://www.quandela.com/resources/use-cases/)
## Photonics
## the clear option for quantum transformation
Photonics is the clear option for building a truly large-scale quantum computer for quantum utility. Photons are natural information carriers, making photon-based technology ideal for computations, communications, and cybersecurity applications. Quandela's unique technology is modular, interconnected, and compatible with state-of-the-art error-correcting codes and is on the fast track to quantum advantage. Our algorithms are designed to tackle a variety of industrial applications including energy, healthcare, and finance.
Prometheus, our cutting-edge single-photon source, emits identical photons on demand, ensuring the creation of high-quality qubits. It is based on a well-established semiconducting technology that has effectively eliminated barriers for scalability.
[Learn More About Prometheus](https://www.quandela.com/products-and-services/prometheus/)
Our proprietary Spin Optical Quantum Computing architecture empowers us to execute a wide range of error correction protocols with highly efficient use of qubits. We leverage spin-mediated qubit devices, a unique innovation that enables us to generate deterministic entanglement between photonic qubits as they are created.
## Quandela's Quantum Acceleration Program
## consolidates your quantum adoption
The Quandela Quantum Acceleration (QAP) Program is your gateway to your quantum transformation. It will guide your organization from exploring and deep understanding of quantum technologies to the advanced stages of quantum advantage analysis and Quandela hardware delivery on premises.
During an orientation session, we will present the details of the program’s 4 Ds phases of the Quantum Acceleration Program— Discover, Design, Develop, and Deliver . Each phase operates via three options that you will take depending on your needs, maturity, and preferences. In the following table you will find the list of activities according to each option.
![](https://www.quandela.com/wp-content/themes/quandela/assets/images/acceleration-program/discover.jpg)
## The Quantum Acceleration Program 
## Activities
### Quantum Exploration
### Quantum Value
## Quantum Fabric
#### Discover
  * Extensive training program on quantum programming using Quandela's Training Center and Software Development Kit.


  * In-depth training on Quandela algorithms and use cases offered in our Quantum Toolbox.


  * Exclusive guided tour to our industry-grade quantum computer factory, where you will get familiar with our innovations.


#### Design
  * Workshop sessions to assess what area of your business is being disrupted by quantum computing and which use cases are relevant for your organization. 
  * Create a simplified model tailored to one use case.


  * End-to-end algorithm analysis for use cases to select the most promising one. Create a complex model, tailored to the chosen use case.


  * Workshop session to assess your hardware and software needs.


#### Develop
  * Create a Perceval implementation of the simplified model created in the Design phase.


  * Develop a Perceval implementation of the complex model from the Design phase and scale it to the limits of classical stimulability.


  * Co-develop the hardware and software components tailored to your needs.


#### Deliver
  * Get hands-on experience by running your algorithm on a QPU with the Enterprise Cloud Plan.


  * Conduct simulations on our GPU-based HPC facility. Analyze the results in alignment with Quandela's roadmap and assess the quantum scaling process to the point where your business achieves quantum advantage.


  * Receive and integrate the co-developed quantum computer and get trained in using it.


## Quandela Centre of Excellence
Our Quantum Acceleration Program provides a foundation for your quantum transformation by ensuring transparency of program operations and bringing together teams with a common understanding of how to implement quantum algorithms to solve complex business problems. Our approach serves as a model for quickly designing and implementing a Center of Excellence for Quantum Transformation (CEQT).
## Success Stories
“Quandela has proactively addressed the issue of MAPF (Multi Agent Path Finding). Their open and honest exchanges reflect a constant commitment to finding solutions, despite the current global quantum hardware limitations, and the need to further challenge quantum-based software solutions. Both our companies have learned a great deal from this study.” 
Laurent MIRALLES, Head of Massy Prototyping Engineering Unit at Safran Electronics & Défense.

<script>
    let menuIcon = document.getElementById('menu-icon');
    let closeIcon = document.getElementById('close-icon');
    let menuOverlay = document.getElementById('menu-overlay');
    let body = document.body;

    function toggleMenu() {
        menuOverlay.classList.toggle('active');
        body.classList.toggle('no-scroll');

        if (menuOverlay.classList.contains('active')) {
            menuIcon.style.display = 'none';
            closeIcon.style.display = 'block';
        } else {
            menuIcon.style.display = 'block';
            closeIcon.style.display = 'none';
        }
    }

    menuIcon.addEventListener('click', toggleMenu);

    closeIcon.addEventListener('click', toggleMenu);

    document.querySelectorAll('.menu-title').forEach(function(title) {
        title.addEventListener('click', function() {
            document.querySelectorAll('.mb-dropdown-children').forEach(function(dropdown) {
                dropdown.style.height = '0'; // Đặt chiều cao của tất cả các mục con về 0
            });

            const dropdown = this.nextElementSibling;
            if (dropdown.style.height === '0px' || dropdown.style.height === '') {
                dropdown.style.height = dropdown.scrollHeight + 'px';
            } else {
                dropdown.style.height = '0';
            }
        });
    });
</script>

<script>
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
        // Get all dropdown elements
        let dropdowns = document.querySelectorAll('.dropdown');

        // Add click event listener to each dropdown
        dropdowns.forEach(function(dropdown) {
            let dropdownName = dropdown.querySelector('.dropdown-name');
            let dropdownContent = dropdown.querySelector('.dropdown-content');

            dropdownName.addEventListener('click', handleFocus);
            dropdownName.addEventListener('mouseover', handleFocus);
            function handleFocus (event) {
                event.preventDefault();


                if (dropdownContent.style.display === 'none' || dropdownContent.style.display === '') {
                    dropdownContent.style.display = 'block';
                    dropdownName.classList.add('dropdown-active')
                }

                dropdowns.forEach(function(dropdown) {
                    let dropdownName = dropdown.querySelector('.dropdown-name');
                    let dropdownContent = dropdown.querySelector('.dropdown-content');
                    if (!dropdown.contains(event.target)) {
                        dropdownContent.style.display = 'none';
                        dropdownName.classList.remove('dropdown-active')
                    }
                });

            }
        });

        let isMouseInside = false;
        const navbar = document.querySelector('.navbar')

        navbar.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
            isMouseInside = true;
        });

        function handleClickOut(event) {
            if (isMouseInside) return;
            dropdowns.forEach(function(dropdown) {
                let dropdownName = dropdown.querySelector('.dropdown-name');
                let dropdownContent = dropdown.querySelector('.dropdown-content');
                if (!dropdown.contains(event?.target)) {
                    dropdownContent.style.display = 'none';
                    dropdownName.classList.remove('dropdown-active')
                }
            });
        }

        navbar.addEventListener('mouseleave', (event) => {
            setTimeout(() => {
                handleClickOut(event);
            }, 500)
            isMouseInside = false;
        });
        document.addEventListener("scroll", handleClickOut);
        document.addEventListener('click', handleClickOut);

    });
</script>

<div class="wp-block-group q-acceleration-header q-header-common-height has-global-padding is-layout-constrained wp-block-group-is-layout-constrained visible" style="margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0">
<div class="wp-block-group homepage-container has-global-padding is-content-justification-left is-layout-constrained wp-container-core-group-is-layout-7 wp-block-group-is-layout-constrained visible" style="padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--128);padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--128)">
<h1 class="wp-block-heading visible" id="h-quantum-acceleration-program" style="font-style:normal;font-weight:700">Quantum Acceleration Program</h1>



<p style="font-size:clamp(26.465px, 1.654rem + ((1vw - 3.2px) * 1.448), 45px);" class="visible">The corporate solution for your organization to become quantum ready</p>
</div>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-group homepage-container is-layout-flow wp-block-group-is-layout-flow" style="margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0">
<div class="wp-block-group is-vertical is-content-justification-center is-layout-flex wp-container-core-group-is-layout-9 wp-block-group-is-layout-flex" style="padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40)">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-brand-orange-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-4d804fc8d10765d2b8d462f2ebdb36b3" id="h-adopting-quantum-computing" style="font-size:clamp(14px, 0.875rem + ((1vw - 3.2px) * 0.156), 16px);text-transform:uppercase">Adopting quantum computing</h2>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-large-font-size" id="h-the-right-strategy" style="text-transform:capitalize">the right strategy</h2>
</div>



<p>During the last decades, organizations have faced disruptive technology challenges. We went through the digital and cloud transformations; now, we are experiencing the AI transformation. Quantum computing is next in line. This rapidly emerging technology holds the potential to solve the most pressing scientific and industrial problems, such as optimization, cryptography, and drug discovery. It will certainly change the world in ways escaping our imagination. For these reasons, many industries are already adopting quantum computing. However, embracing emerging technologies goes beyond a technical problem; it is a people's challenge. Quandela's Quantum Acceleration Program will effectively assist your organization in adopting quantum computing for your quantum transformation.</p>



<div class="wp-block-buttons is-content-justification-center is-layout-flex wp-container-core-buttons-is-layout-2 wp-block-buttons-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-button"><a class="wp-block-button__link has-text-align-center wp-element-button" href="/resources/use-cases/">Explore Quantum Use Cases</a></div>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-group is-vertical is-content-justification-center is-layout-flex wp-container-core-group-is-layout-10 wp-block-group-is-layout-flex">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-brand-orange-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-a207c0c23092fae7404af893e8ce0c5d" id="h-photonics" style="font-size:clamp(14px, 0.875rem + ((1vw - 3.2px) * 0.156), 16px);text-transform:uppercase">Photonics</h2>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-large-font-size" id="h-the-clear-option-for-quantum-transformation" style="text-transform:capitalize">the clear option for quantum transformation</h2>
</div>



<p>Photonics is the clear option for building a truly large-scale quantum computer for quantum utility. Photons are natural information carriers, making photon-based technology ideal for computations, communications, and cybersecurity applications.  Quandela's unique technology is modular, interconnected, and compatible with state-of-the-art error-correcting codes and is on the fast track to quantum advantage. Our algorithms are designed to tackle a variety of industrial applications including energy, healthcare, and finance.</p>



<p>Prometheus, our cutting-edge single-photon source, emits identical photons on demand, ensuring the creation of high-quality qubits. It is based on a well-established semiconducting technology that has effectively eliminated barriers for scalability.</p>



<div class="wp-block-buttons is-content-justification-center is-layout-flex wp-container-core-buttons-is-layout-3 wp-block-buttons-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-button is-style-outline is-style-outline--3"><a class="wp-block-button__link wp-element-button" href="/products-and-services/prometheus/">Learn More About Prometheus</a></div>
</div>



<p>Our proprietary Spin Optical Quantum Computing architecture empowers us to execute a wide range of error correction protocols with highly efficient use of qubits. We leverage spin-mediated qubit devices, a unique innovation that enables us to generate deterministic entanglement between photonic qubits as they are created.</p>



<div class="wp-block-group is-vertical is-content-justification-center is-layout-flex wp-container-core-group-is-layout-11 wp-block-group-is-layout-flex">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-brand-orange-color has-text-color has-link-color wp-elements-ea56d353c9c243002dfb5e52be432a9d" id="h-quandela-s-quantum-acceleration-program" style="font-size:clamp(14px, 0.875rem + ((1vw - 3.2px) * 0.156), 16px);text-transform:uppercase">Quandela's Quantum Acceleration Program</h2>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-large-font-size" id="h-consolidates-your-quantum-adoption" style="text-transform:capitalize">consolidates your quantum adoption</h2>
</div>



<p>The Quandela Quantum Acceleration (QAP) Program is your gateway to your quantum transformation. It will guide your organization from exploring and deep understanding of quantum technologies to the advanced stages of quantum advantage analysis and Quandela hardware delivery on premises.</p>



<p>During an orientation session, we will present the details of the program’s 4 Ds phases  of the Quantum Acceleration Program— Discover, Design, Develop, and Deliver . Each phase operates via three options that you will take depending on your needs, maturity, and preferences. In the following table you will find the list of activities according to each option.</p>

<h4 class="wp-block-heading has-medium-font-size">Design</h4>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Workshop sessions to assess what area of your business is being disrupted by quantum computing and which use cases are relevant for your organization. </li>



<li>Create a simplified model tailored to one use case.</li>
</ul>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>End-to-end algorithm analysis for use cases to select the most promising one. Create a complex model, tailored to the chosen use case.</li>
</ul>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Workshop session to assess your hardware and software needs.</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>

<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Create a Perceval implementation of the simplified model created in the Design phase.</li>
</ul>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Develop a Perceval implementation of the complex model from the Design phase and scale it to the limits of classical stimulability.</li>
</ul>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">

</ul>
</div>

<h4 class="wp-block-heading has-medium-font-size">Deliver</h4>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Get hands-on experience by running your algorithm on a QPU with the Enterprise Cloud Plan.</li>
</ul>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Conduct simulations on our GPU-based HPC facility. Analyze the results in alignment with Quandela's roadmap and assess the quantum scaling process to the point where your business achieves quantum advantage.</li>
</ul>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Receive and integrate the co-developed quantum computer and get trained in using it.</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-group has-global-padding is-layout-constrained wp-block-group-is-layout-constrained" style="padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40)">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center has-large-font-size" id="h-quandela-centre-of-excellence" style="text-transform:capitalize">Quandela Centre of Excellence</h2>



<p>Our Quantum Acceleration Program provides a foundation for your quantum transformation by ensuring transparency of program operations and bringing together teams with a common understanding of how to implement quantum algorithms to solve complex business problems. Our approach serves as a model for quickly designing and implementing a Center of Excellence for Quantum Transformation (CEQT).</p>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-group has-global-padding is-layout-constrained wp-block-group-is-layout-constrained" style="padding-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40)">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center has-large-font-size" id="h-success-stories" style="text-transform:capitalize">Success Stories</h2>



<div class="wp-block-group has-global-padding is-layout-constrained wp-container-core-group-is-layout-16 wp-block-group-is-layout-constrained" style="border-left-color:var(--wp--preset--color--brand-blue);border-left-width:4px;padding-right:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40);padding-left:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40)">
<p>“Quandela has proactively addressed the issue of MAPF (Multi Agent Path Finding). Their open and honest exchanges reflect a constant commitment to finding solutions, despite the current global quantum hardware limitations, and the need to further challenge quantum-based software solutions. Both our companies have learned a great deal from this study.” </p>



<p style="font-style:italic;font-weight:200">Laurent MIRALLES, Head of Massy Prototyping Engineering Unit at Safran Electronics & Défense.</p>
</div>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-buttons is-content-justification-center is-layout-flex wp-container-core-buttons-is-layout-4 wp-block-buttons-is-layout-flex" style="margin-top:var(--wp--preset--spacing--64);margin-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--64)">
<div class="wp-block-button is-style-outline is-style-outline--4"><a class="wp-block-button__link wp-element-button" href="https://outlook.office365.com/owa/calendar/QuantumAccelerationProgram@quandela.com/bookings/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Register here and enjoy our free orientation session</a></div>
</div>


    
<div class="wp-block-group is-vertical is-content-justification-center is-layout-flex wp-container-core-group-is-layout-18 wp-block-group-is-layout-flex" style="padding-bottom:var(--wp--preset--spacing--40)">
    <div class="wp-block-template-part"><div class="wp-block-button is-style-outline download-brochure-btn" id="download-btn-6a3220e250e27"> <a style="display: flex; align-items: center" class="wp-block-button__link wp-element-button" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><svg style="width: 16px; margin: 0 10px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path fill="currentColor" d="M13 13v5.585l1.828-1.828l1.415 1.415L12 22.414l-4.243-4.242l1.415-1.415L11 18.585V13zM12 2a7 7 0 0 1 6.954 6.194A5.5 5.5 0 0 1 18 18.978v-2.014a3.5 3.5 0 1 0-1.111-6.91a5 5 0 1 0-9.777 0a3.5 3.5 0 0 0-1.292 6.88l.18.03v2.014a5.5 5.5 0 0 1-.954-10.784A7 7 0 0 1 12 2"></path></svg>Download the QAP brochure</a></div>
<p>    <script src="https://challenges.cloudflare.com/turnstile/v0/api.js?render=explicit" async="" defer=""></script></p>
<p>    <script>
        document.getElementById('download-btn-6a3220e250e27').addEventListener('click', handleDownloadFile);
        function showLoader() {
            document.getElementById('rbl--loading-download').style.display = 'flex';
        }
        function hideLoader() {
            document.getElementById('rbl--loading-download').style.display = 'none';
        }
        function downloadFile() {
            const url = '/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/Quandela-QAP-brochure-web-061224.pdf';
            const link = document.createElement('a');
            link.href = url;
            link.download = url.split('/').pop();
            link.click();
        }
        function handleDownloadFile() {
                        const form = document.getElementById('brochure-form');
            if(form) {
                form.reset();
            }
            if (!document.getElementById('brochure-dialog')) {
                const overlay = document.createElement('div');
                overlay.id = 'overlay';
                overlay.className='overlay';
                document.body.appendChild(overlay);
                const dialog = document.createElement('div');
                dialog.id = 'brochure-dialog';
                dialog.className = 'brochure-dialog';
                dialog.innerHTML = `</p>
<div class="brochure-dialog-aside-image">
  <img decoding="async" src="/wp-content/themes/quandela/assets/images/dialog/banner.jpg">
</div>
<div class="brochure-dialog-content">
<div class="brochure-dialog--header">
    <span style="font-size: 32px">Download Free QAP brochure! </span>
    <span style="line-height: 20px">We’re excited to share our QAP brochure with you! To get your hands on it, please take a moment to fill in your details below. </span>
    <span id="brochure-dialog-cancel-icon" class="brochure-dialog-cancel-icon">×</span>
  </div>
<form id="brochure-form" class="brochure-form">
    <label class="brochure-form--label" for="fullName">Full name:</label>
    <input class="brochure-form--input" type="text" id="fullName" name="fullName" required></p>
<p>    <label class="brochure-form--label" for="email">Email:</label>
    <input class="brochure-form--input" type="email" id="email" name="email" required></p>
<p>    <label class="brochure-form--label" for="organization">Organization:</label>
    <input class="brochure-form--input" type="text" id="organization" name="organization" required></p>
<p>    <label class="brochure-form--label" for="role">Role/Position in the organization:</label>
    <input class="brochure-form--input" type="text" id="role" name="role" required></p>
<div id="captchaWidget"></div>
<p>    <input style="display: none" name="cf-turnstile-response" id="cf-turnstile-response"></p>
<div class="wp-block-buttons is-layout-flex wp-block-buttons-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-button">
        <button type="submit" class="wp-block-button__link wp-element-button">Get The QAP brochure </button>
      </div>
<div class="wp-block-button is-style-outline">
        <button id="brochure-dialog-cancel-btn" class="wp-block-button__link wp-element-button"> Cancel </button>
      </div>
</p></div>
<div id="form-notice" style="color: #d42c2c;"></div>
</p></form>
</div>
<div id="rbl--loading-download" class="overlay" style="position: absolute;">
<div class="loader"></div>
</div>
<p>                `;
                document.body.appendChild(dialog);
                const formNotice = document.getElementById('form-notice');
                document.getElementById('brochure-dialog-cancel-icon').addEventListener('click', function() {
                    dialog.style.display = 'none';
                    overlay.style.display = 'none';
                    formNotice.innerHTML = ''
                    turnstile.reset('#captchaWidget');
                });
                document.getElementById('brochure-dialog-cancel-btn').addEventListener('click', function() {
                    dialog.style.display = 'none';
                    overlay.style.display = 'none';
                    formNotice.innerHTML = ''
                    turnstile.reset('#captchaWidget');
                });
                document.getElementById('brochure-form').addEventListener('submit', function (event) {
                    event.preventDefault();
                    showLoader();
                    // Push submit form event
                    window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
                    window.dataLayer.push({
                        'event' : 'form_submit',
                    });
                    console.log(`[GTM] Pushed form_submit`);
                    const fullName = document.getElementById('fullName').value;
                    const email = document.getElementById('email').value;
                    const organization = document.getElementById('organization').value;
                    const role = document.getElementById('role').value;
                    const turnstileResponse = document.getElementById('cf-turnstile-response').value;
                    if (!turnstileResponse) {
                        formNotice.innerHTML=`</p>
<div>Please complete the CAPTCHA.</div>
<p>`;
                        hideLoader();
                        return;
                    }
                    function handleDownload() {
                        dialog.style.display = 'none';
                        overlay.style.display = 'none';
                        downloadFile()
                    }
                    const captchaForm = new FormData();
                    captchaForm.append('action', 'verify_turnstile'); // Action name for AJAX handler
                    captchaForm.append('response', turnstileResponse);
                    fetch('https://www.quandela.com/wp-admin/admin-ajax.php', {
                        method: 'POST',
                        body: captchaForm,
                    })
                        .then(response => response.json())
                        .then(data => {
                            if (data.success) {
                                const formData = new FormData();
                                formData.append('action', 'call_to_jira'); // Action name for AJAX handler
                                formData.append('name', fullName);
                                formData.append('email', email);
                                formData.append('organization', organization);
                                formData.append('role', role);
                                formData.append('type', "DOWNLOAD_REQUEST");
                                formData.append('title', `Request download QAP brochure from ${fullName} `);
                                formData.append('message', `Request download QAP brochure from ${fullName} `);
                                fetch('https://www.quandela.com/wp-admin/admin-ajax.php', {
                                    method: 'POST',
                                    body: formData,
                                })
                                    .then(response => response.json())
                                    .then(response => {
                                        hideLoader();
                                        turnstile.reset('#captchaWidget');
                                        if (response.success) {
                                            formNotice.innerHTML=``;
                                        } else {
                                            formNotice.innerHTML=``;
                                        }
                                    })
                                    .catch(error => {
                                        hideLoader();
                                        turnstile.reset('#captchaWidget');
                                        formNotice.innerHTML = ``;
                                    })
                                    .finally(() => {
                                        handleDownload();
                                    });
                            } else {
                                hideLoader();
                                turnstile.reset('#captchaWidget');
                                formNotice.innerHTML=`</p>
<div>CAPTCHA verification failed</div>
<p>`
                            }
                        })
                        .catch(error => {
                            hideLoader();
                            turnstile.reset('#captchaWidget');
                            formNotice.innerHTML=`</p>
<div>CAPTCHA verification failed</div>
<p>`
                        });
                });
                hideLoader();
                turnstile.render('#captchaWidget', {
                    sitekey: '0x4AAAAAAAxcHksCTkDTCX7x',
                    callback: function(token) {
                        document.getElementById('cf-turnstile-response').value = token;
                    }
                });
            }
            document.getElementById('brochure-dialog').style.display = 'flex';
            document.getElementById('overlay').style.display = 'block';
        }
    </script></p>
</div>

    .social-media-links {

        padding: 0;
        display: flex;

    .social-media-links li {
        display: inline-block;
        margin-left: 0;
    }

    .social-media-links a svg {
        width: 30px; /* Adjust the size of the icons */
        height: 30px;
        transition: transform 0.3s;
    }

    .social-media-links a:hover svg {
        transform: scale(1.1); /* Slight zoom on hover */

<script id="wp-block-template-skip-link-js-after">
	( function() {
		var skipLinkTarget = document.querySelector( 'main' ),
			sibling,
			skipLinkTargetID,
			skipLink;

		// Early exit if a skip-link target can't be located.
		if ( ! skipLinkTarget ) {
			return;
		}

		/*
		 * Get the site wrapper.
		 * The skip-link will be injected in the beginning of it.
		 */
		sibling = document.querySelector( '.wp-site-blocks' );

		// Early exit if the root element was not found.
		if ( ! sibling ) {
			return;
		}

		// Get the skip-link target's ID, and generate one if it doesn't exist.
		skipLinkTargetID = skipLinkTarget.id;
		if ( ! skipLinkTargetID ) {
			skipLinkTargetID = 'wp--skip-link--target';
			skipLinkTarget.id = skipLinkTargetID;
		}

		// Create the skip link.
		skipLink = document.createElement( 'a' );
		skipLink.classList.add( 'skip-link', 'screen-reader-text' );
		skipLink.href = '#' + skipLinkTargetID;
		skipLink.innerHTML = 'Skip to content';

		// Inject the skip link.
		sibling.parentElement.insertBefore( skipLink, sibling );
	}() );
	
</script>
